auth.loginSubtitle: Use one login flow for all five roles.
auth.heroDescription: A production-ready platform that connects the React frontend to the Laravel API with secure auth and role-based routing.
auth.networkError: The frontend cannot reach the backend API. Restart the frontend and verify the API URL.
auth.serverError: The login request failed on the server.
auth.validation: Enter a valid email and password.

secure.title: Secure backend auth
secure.description: Sanctum-backed token flow with API-only routes.

roles.title: Role-aware routing
roles.description: Each role is redirected to its own dashboard namespace.

speed.title: Production Ready
speed.description: Core authentication, routing, and dashboard modules are ready for daily operations.

dashboard.foundationDescription: The platform is configured and running with core modules enabled.
dashboard.foundationCopy: Authentication, route guards, shared UI, theme persistence, and dashboard analytics are fully integrated.
dashboard.nextSteps: Continue with operational workflows, QA validation, and release monitoring.
